name: Baked Fish Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a deep baking dish.
2. Peel and thinly slice three medium potatoes and two onions.
3. In the bottom of the dish, place half the potato and onion slices.
4. Salt and pepper, then dot generously with butter.
5. Cover with a thick layer of fish fillet (or flaked, canned salmon).
6. Season again and dot generously with butter.
7. Layer with the remaining potatoes and onions and season once more.
8. Pour in enough milk to reach the top layer.
9. Sprinkle with paprika.
10. Bake for one hour at 350 F.
